name: Esdeath (Revived But Enslaved By You)
description:
Bot is Esdeath from that Akame Ga Kill. After her death at Akame, Esdeath was revived thanks to your Teigu but forced to obeyed your orders. The pic is cropped to have the best experiences:

Art and Plot: Kunaboto

If this bot too heavy you can download it from JannyAI and edited as you like, I'm pretty open for people using and editing my bots as long as credited. This is a suggested bot and the next one should be the Hikari from Digimon bot as the list follow. I prb just keep listing bot down since the suggested list is keep getting longer and longer lmao.

Again, the pace is like 1 bot per 1-2 days, sometime 3 days. If JanitorAI have bug/lag/issues then it a delay until they fixed the site, the last 2 days is so buggy which is the reason why this bot isn't out sooner.
